PlatformFeedbackForm.title: Help us improve the platform
PlatformFeedbackForm.description: Your feedback helps us improve the learning materials, navigation, tests and technical experience across the platform.

easeOfUse.label: How easy is the platform to use?
easeOfUse.hint: Think about the overall experience of using the platform.

moduleClarity.label: How clear and understandable are the learning modules?
moduleClarity.hint: Consider the structure, readability and clarity of module content.

navigation.label: How easy is it to navigate between sections and modules?
navigation.hint: Consider menus, buttons, links and moving between platform areas.

testsExperience.label: How would you rate the experience of completing tests and assessments?
testsExperience.hint: Consider clarity of questions, flow, feedback and ease of submission.

technicalProblems.label: How would you rate the technical reliability of the platform?
technicalProblems.hint: Consider loading, errors, display issues or other technical problems.

overallSatisfaction.label: How satisfied are you overall with the platform?
overallSatisfaction.hint: Give your overall impression of the platform experience.

suggestions.label: What would you improve?
suggestions.hint: Share suggestions for improving content, navigation, tests or the general learning experience.

technicalNotes.label: Did you notice any technical problems?
technicalNotes.hint: Describe any bugs, loading issues, layout problems or confusing behaviour.

validation.required: Please answer all required questions before submitting.
validation.submitError: We could not save your feedback. Please try again.

success.title: Thank you for your feedback
success.description: Your response has been saved. You can continue using the platform as usual.

PlatformFeedbackDashboardCard.title: Help us improve the platform
PlatformFeedbackDashboardCard.description: Your feedback will help us improve the materials, navigation and platform experience.

PlatformFeedbackAdminDashboard.title: Platform feedback results
PlatformFeedbackAdminDashboard.description: Review user feedback about usability, navigation, tests, technical experience and overall satisfaction.
